name: fantastic-octo-waffle
description: Deterministic developer and CI command contract for Blazor WASM.

scripts.build:app: dotnet restore src/BlazorApp/BlazorApp.csproj && dotnet build src/BlazorApp/BlazorApp.csproj -c Release --no-restore
scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:dotnet
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run build:app && npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
